title: ItemSymbol
body:
When designing storages, you usually use frames, because you can put an item on them. This is clearer than writing text on signs.


But the frames have many minuses: fragility, high cost and a limit of 1 item.



This resourcepack makes it possible to write on signs (chat, books, names of items, etc.) any texture of blocks and items!



You can write several textures on one signs, write text, draw pictures, write icons in chat and much more!



FAQ:


<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

Q: How do I write this on a sign?\
A: Click on the "Wiki" or [this button](https://4epbrk6rk6rk.github.io/test/). Start typing the name of the texture (it often matches with the name of the item) in search field and press Enter, similar options should be displayed on the right. Then select the size you need: 1 or 3 rows. Click on the texture you want to copy. And finally insert it into the game using Ctrl+V



Q: Where can these symbols be used?\
A: In ANY text fields inside the game. In addition to tablets, you can write in chat, books, names of objects or mobs, perhaps even in the names of worlds and servers. But remember that the symbols are NOT displayed outside the game



Q: What languages are supported?\
A: Any! The resourcepack uses a unused custom unicode character range, that does not replace any usable character



Q: Why the symbol I write on the sign is black?\
A: The text on the signs is black by default, which is why the texture is completely blacked out. Click the sign with a white dye and the texture will be fully colored as original item! (You can also use colored and glowing dyes. Experiment with other colors!)



Q: Some textures are flattened, how can I fix it?\
A: Due to the way the game works, animated textures may not be displayed correctly. To fix it, you need to fix the code manually for each texture. I plan to fix all vanilla animated textures soon



Q: Is it compatible with other resource packs?\
A: Fully compatible! All textures are taken from the active resourcepack. You can even use high-resolution resourcepacks!



Q: Will the resource pack work on a server?\
A: Yes. Most servers will not interfere with it's functioning and other players that are using it will see everything as you do



Q: The resource pack has many versions, will it work if I update the game?\
A: Yes! I try to keep full compatibility between versions. You won't see textures from new versions of the game on the old version. If you are using the portable version, it has all the textures in it, so you will see block textures that are not present on your version of the game

</details>

Please give me feedback in the comments on [PlanetMinecraft](https://www.planetminecraft.com/texture-pack/itemsymbol)! I will be very grateful to you

I'm testing a "Portable" version for fast loads! It should behave the same as the original version, but it should load much faster due to the fact that I saved it in a faster format, sacrificing the support of the user's resource pack. If you want to see your textures on the signs use the original version!
